rules.label: Entry
rules.text: 60% TQQQ at all times (rebalanced once per year)

name: TQQQ/SOXL/TECL Basket IBS Extreme + ATR Stop

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: TQQQ IBS = (close − low)/(high − low) < 0.1 → equal-weight 1/3 TQQQ + 1/3 SOXL + 1/3 TECL

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: TQQQ IBS > 0.9 OR TQQQ close < entry − 3 × ATR(14, Wilder)

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal & ATR: TQQQ. Execution: TQQQ / SOXL / TECL

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: For each QQQ RSI(2, Wilder) threshold (20, 25, 30): count if RSI < threshold. Basket weight = n / 3

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / SOXL / TECL (equal-weight)

name: TQQQ Expanding Range Breakout + ATR Trailing Stop

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: All three must hold: QQQ > SMA(200), yesterday's QQQ range > the day-before's, ADX(10) > 25 → 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: TQQQ ≥ 20-day high OR TQQQ < (price − 3 × ATR(14, Wilder), ratcheting up) OR QQQ < SMA(200)

name: TQQQ Dynamic Sizing: SMA200 + RSI Tiers

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: TQQQ > SMA(200): 50% on first entry, 100% on RSI(2, Wilder) < 30 dip, 20% on RSI(14, Wilder) > 70 overbought

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ > SMA(200): start at 50% TQQQ; +15% per 5% TQQQ gain above entry (cap 100%)

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Count n = # of SMA periods (20, 50, 100, 150, 200) that QQQ price exceeds. TQQQ weight = n / 5

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Position scales down each time an SMA is lost

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Count n = # of Donchian midlines (50, 100, 150, 200) that QQQ exceeds. TQQQ weight = n / 4. Midline = (period high + period low) / 2

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Position scales down each time a midline is lost

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Count n = # of signals bullish: ROC(20) > 0, UpDay(20) > 10, TII(20) > 10. TQQQ weight = n / 3

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Position scales down each time a signal flips bearish

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ > SMA(200) AND stretch = (price − SMA) / SMA < 5% → 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: EMA(50) of QQQ > EMA(200) of QQQ → 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: TQQQ < (price − 3 × ATR(14, Wilder), ratcheting up) OR EMA(50) ≤ EMA(200)

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ > 200-day median AND 25-day avg range < 110% of 200-day avg range → 100% TQQQ; only one true → 50%

rules.label: Components
rules.text: StaticTQQQ60, IBSATRStop, RSIThreeVote, RangeBreakout, SMA200RSITiers, SMA150Trend, SMA200Pyramid, SMAFiveVote, DonchianFourVote, MomentumVote, TrendStretchExit, GoldenCrossATR, RangeCompressed, MFI14Hyst (14 sub-algos)

rules.label: Weighting
rules.text: Equal virtual equity split at start; aggregated proportionally each day, reset annually
